Please make sure these boxes are checked before submitting your PR, thank you!

* Make sure you follow the [Contributing Guide](https://github.com/yourusername/vue-table-touch-scroll/blob/main/.github/CONTRIBUTING.md)
* Make sure you are merging your commits to `main` branch
* Add some descriptions and refer to related issues for your PR
* Make sure all tests pass (`pnpm test`)
* Make sure lint and type check pass (`pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck`)
* Add or update tests if needed
* Update documentation if needed
